bibliography: All papers from arXiv preprint server (arxiv.org), April 2026 or earlier
Zenodo open-access repository for C.A.T. engine paper
Cross-references to MAS project (deep-dived Tier 1 papers)
Cross-references to AGT project (synthesis across all domains)
safety_rules: Paper claims must be attributed to specific authors and institutions
Distinguish between peer-reviewed and preprint status
Note when experimental results are preliminary or on limited benchmarks
